case_title: NETHERCOTT, ALFRED R. VS BRYANT, MARY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-08-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
